privileged_info_summary: The event_badge_mail_merge task uses a synthetic attendee list created in setup_task.sh containing 24 attendee records at /home/ga/Documents/attendees.csv. The CSV includes names: Sarah Chen (BioTech Inc.), Michael Ross (Pearson Legal), Jessica Wong (City Planning), David Miller (StartUp Hub), and 20 additional attendees. The task requires creating formatted name badges with specific requirements: first names bold, centered, 24pt; last names bold, centered, 18pt; organization regular (not bold), centered, 12pt. However, metadata formatting_rules specify different minimum sizes (22pt, 16-20pt, max 14pt) and the verifier logic checks only >= 20pt for first names while ignoring last name and organization size checks entirely. The expected output is /home/ga/Documents/badges_merged.odt. Data is 100% synthetic.
